zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Katherine de Grey於1298年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾斯拉普頓時，她的父親Baron John de Grey40歲，母親Maud de Verdun42歲。她和Geoffrey de Lucy至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1361年在英國巴金哈姆爾庫布林頓享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Katherine de Grey于1298年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾斯拉普頓时，她的父亲Baron John de Grey40岁，母亲Maud de Verdun42岁。她和Geoffrey de Lucy至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1361年在英国巴金哈姆爾庫布林頓享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Katherine de Grey was born in 1298, in Slapton, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Baron John de Grey, was 40 and her mother, Maud de Verdun, was 42. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Geoffrey de Lucy. She died in 1361, in Cublington, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 63.

Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Geoffrey de Lucy. Elle est décédée en 1361, à Cublington, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine de Grey(이)가 1298년 영국 노르섬프토실르 슬라프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baron John de Grey(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Verdun(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 Geoffrey de Lucy(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1361년 영국 벅잉함실르 쿠블링턴에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Katherine de Grey родилась в 1298 г. в местности слаптон, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Baron John de Grey было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Verdun, 42. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Geoffrey de Lucy. Она умерла в 1361 г. в местности кублингтон, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.
